Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
105 
DSPNSNG_FEE_AMT 
LABEL: 
Dispensing Fee Submitted Amount 
DESCRIPTION: The charge to cover the cost of dispensing the prescription. Dispensing costs include overhead, 
supplies, and labor, etc. to fill the prescription. 
SHORT NAME: DSPNSNG_FEE_AMT 
LONG NAME: DSPNSNG_FEE_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
RX line 
VALUES: 
Dollar
